_: Seed dictionary of well-known PoE1 passive nodes (keystones, notables, ascendancy keystones). Schema: {id, name, kind, description, ascendancy?}. Run download-passive-nodes.ps1 to regenerate from the live tree. kind ∈ keystone | notable | mastery | jewel_socket | ascendancy_keystone | ascendancy_notable | ascendancy_small.

nodes.name: Resolute Technique
nodes.description: Your hits can't be Evaded. Never deal Critical Strikes.

nodes.name: Mind Over Matter
nodes.description: 30% of Damage taken from Mana before Life. Damage taken from your Mana before Life is 50% Effective.

nodes.name: Eldritch Battery
nodes.description: Spend Energy Shield before Mana for Skill Costs. Energy Shield protects Mana instead of Life. 50% less Energy Shield Recharge Rate.

nodes.name: Acrobatics
nodes.description: +30% chance to Suppress Spell Damage. Spell Suppression prevents 100% of Suppressed Spell Damage. Cannot Block.

nodes.name: Iron Reflexes
nodes.description: Converts all Evasion Rating to Armour. Dexterity provides no bonus to Evasion Rating.

nodes.name: Phase Acrobatics
nodes.description: Removed in 3.16 — replaced by Spell Suppression on Acrobatics.

nodes.name: Pain Attunement
nodes.description: 30% more Spell Damage when on Low Life.

nodes.name: Crimson Dance
nodes.description: Your Bleeding can stack up to 8 times. Your Bleeding deals damage 70% slower while you are not moving.

nodes.name: Vaal Pact
nodes.description: Life Leech effects Recover Energy Shield instead while on Full Life.

nodes.name: Ghost Reaver
nodes.description: Leech Energy Shield instead of Life. Maximum Recoverable Energy Shield is 50% of Energy Shield.

nodes.name: Zealot's Oath
nodes.description: Life Regeneration applies to Energy Shield instead of Life.

nodes.name: Blood Magic
nodes.description: Removes all Mana. Spend Life instead of Mana for Skills.

nodes.name: Avatar of Fire
nodes.description: 50% of Physical, Cold and Lightning Damage Converted to Fire Damage. Deal no Non-Fire Damage.

nodes.name: Elemental Equilibrium
nodes.description: Enemies you hit with Elemental Damage temporarily get +25% Resistance to those Elements and -50% Resistance to other Elements.

nodes.name: Elemental Overload
nodes.description: 40% more Elemental Damage if you've Crit in the past 8 seconds. No Critical Strike Multiplier, no damage Multiplier for Ailments from Critical Strikes.

nodes.name: Point Blank
nodes.description: Projectile Attack Hits deal up to 30% more Damage to targets at the start of their movement, dealing less Damage to targets as the projectile travels farther.

nodes.name: Iron Grip
nodes.description: The increase to Physical Damage from Strength applies to Projectile Attacks as well as Melee Attacks.

nodes.name: Iron Will
nodes.description: Strength's Damage bonus applies to Spell Damage as well as Attack Damage.

nodes.name: Mistwalker
nodes.description: Critical Strikes which inflict Bleeding also inflict Rupture. Removed in newer patches; check current league.

nodes.name: Glancing Blows
nodes.description: +20% Chance to Block Attack Damage. +15% Chance to Block Spell Damage. 50% less Damage Blocked.

nodes.name: The Agnostic
nodes.description: Your Maximum Mana is 0. Your Maximum Energy Shield is 0. 60% of your Maximum Life is converted to Mana. 60% of your Maximum Life is converted to Energy Shield.

nodes.name: The Impaler
nodes.description: Your Hits permanently Intimidate Enemies that are on Full Life. Removed/changed; verify current league.

nodes.name: Wicked Ward
nodes.description: Energy Shield Recharge is not interrupted by Damage if Recharge began Recently. 50% less Energy Shield Recharge Rate.

nodes.name: Necromantic Aegis
nodes.description: All bonuses from an equipped Shield apply to your Minions instead of you.

nodes.name: Ancestral Bond
nodes.description: You can't deal Damage with your Skills yourself. Can have up to 1 additional Totem summoned at a time.

nodes.name: Call to Arms
nodes.description: Warcries are Instant. Warcries no longer count Targets, Enemy Power or grant Duration. Warcries grant a fraction of their effect, scaling with the Power they would have shared otherwise.

nodes.name: Precise Technique
nodes.description: Your Hits can't be Evaded. Your Critical Strike Chance is 0 if your Accuracy Rating is lower than your Maximum Life.

nodes.name: Inevitable Judgement
nodes.description: Critical Strikes ignore Enemy Monster Elemental Resistances.

nodes.name: Sanctuary
nodes.description: +1% to all maximum Elemental Resistances. Recover 1% of Life when you Block. Auras and Buffs you Cast grant 1% increased Damage to you and Allies.

nodes.name: Pious Path
nodes.description: Your Energy Shield Recharge is not interrupted by Damage. 100% increased total Energy Shield Recharge Rate from your Sources of Faith.

nodes.name: Righteous Providence
nodes.description: +200 to Strength and Intelligence.

nodes.name: Instruments of Virtue
nodes.description: 10% more Attack Damage for each Non-Instant Spell you've Cast in the past 8 seconds, up to a maximum of 30%. 10% more Cast Speed for each Attack you've used Recently, up to a maximum of 30%. Skills which Throw Mines or Throw Traps grant Mine Throwing Speed and Trap Throwing Speed instead of Cast Speed.

nodes.name: Augury of Penitence
nodes.description: Nearby Enemies have -10% to Elemental Resistances. 10% increased Elemental Damage for each type of Element you have an Equipped Item with a Modifier providing Resistance to.

nodes.name: Doryani's Lesson
nodes.description: Recover 0.6% of Life on Hit with Lightning Damage.

nodes.name: Sovereignty
nodes.description: +10 to Strength. 8% reduced Mana Reserved.

nodes.name: Heart of the Warrior
nodes.description: +30 to maximum Life. 6% increased maximum Life.

nodes.name: Arcane Vision
nodes.description: Sight Radius is based on your Energy Shield instead of your Light Radius. +20% increased Light Radius.

nodes.name: Jewel Socket
nodes.description: An expansion socket where a jewel can be placed.
